backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Asistenku backend canister defining user roles, registration, admin claiming, and access control using a mixin authorization pattern with migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (with OldTask map) into the new actor state shape, preserving users and layanan while resetting task counters.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (DashboardClient live data, Buat Task form, task status cards) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app that mounts the React root and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that sets up TanStack Router with all routes (public layout and app layout) and wraps the app in a React Query provider.
frontend/src/components/Closing.tsx: Simple centered closing section component displaying a single quality-assurance statement for the landing page.
frontend/src/components/ConversionStatem: Landing page section component displaying two centered statements about Asistenku's service unit conversion approach.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component with the Asistenku logo, copyright text, and navigation links to Concierge WhatsApp, Internal Login, and Partner Portal.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with logo, desktop navigation links (Layanan, Daftar, Masuk), and a responsive mobile hamburger menu using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Landing page hero section with a headline, description, a 'Pilih Layanan' scroll button, a WhatsApp contact button, and a hero image.
frontend/src/components/HowWeSupport.tsx: Static section explaining the four-step support process Asistenku uses to handle client task delegation.
frontend/src/components/JoinTeam.tsx: Simple CTA section inviting users to learn about joining the Asistenku partner team, linking to the partner info page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Dashboard: Layout wrapper for dashboard pages providing a custom header slot, centered content area, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCards.tsx: Displays four service tier cards (Tenang, Rapi, Fokus, Jaga) in an accordion grid, each showing pricing, unit allocation, and an expandable description.
frontend/src/components/TimelyDelivery.t: Static informational section highlighting Asistenku's ability to handle urgent work in parallel without losing control.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of TanStack Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for user registration (client, partner, admin), role retrieval, layanan fetching, and task creation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, including brand colors (teal, navy) and utility classes.
frontend/src/layouts/AppLayout.tsx: Minimal authenticated app layout wrapping a full-height flex container with a TanStack Router Outlet for nested routes.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout that wraps pages with a shared Header and Footer, rendering child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/ClientLogin.tsx: Client login page that handles Internet Identity authentication and redirects verified clients to their dashboard, showing an error if the user is not registered.
frontend/src/pages/ClientRegister.tsx: Client registration page that requires Internet Identity login and submits a form (name, email, WhatsApp, company) to register a new client account.
frontend/src/pages/dashboard/finance.tsx: Empty finance dashboard page file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/dashboard/internal.ts: Internal admin dashboard page with mock data for users, tickets, and history, featuring collapsible sections, user management, and status/role controls.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardClient.tsx: Client dashboard page displaying collapsible cards for active services, task creation form, and task history, fetching data via custom query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPartner.tsx: Partner dashboard page showing mock data for task summaries, wallet/saldo info, and collapsible task lists grouped by status (assigned, in-progress, revision, QA, history).
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page that composes multiple marketing section components (Hero, HowWeSupport, ServiceCards, etc.) into a single scrollable page.
frontend/src/pages/InternalPortal.tsx: Internal portal page for staff login via Internet Identity, with admin claim, user registration, and role-based dashboard navigation for allowed internal roles.
frontend/src/pages/PartnerPortal.tsx: Partner portal page allowing users to log in via Internet Identity, register as a partner with form fields, and access the partner dashboard after role verification.
frontend/src/pages/TentangPartner.tsx: Static informational page describing how Asistenku partners work, including levels, verification, pay standards, and the transparent work system.
frontend/src/utils/smoothScroll.ts: Utility function that smoothly scrolls the page to a DOM element by its ID.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframes, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing the current architecture (ICP/Motoko backend with Internet Identity, role-based registration/approval, task and layanan management) and listing existing features, known issues, and architectural notes for the build planner.
